name: Verify video is horizontal on play page
fullName: Verify video view on play page for horizontal videos CSA: Verify video is horizontal on play page

steps.name: And user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Explore
When user "plays" the entity "Delete pop quiz" from Explore "Videos" using Filter "Recent"
When user applies template "CSA" on the video play page
Then user verifies CSA Common player functions Play,Speed,Mute,Forward,Rewind,SeekToEnd,Replay using player "kPlayer1"

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Verify video view on play page for horizontal videos CSA
